articles.title: WhatsApp Is Adding A New GIF Provider Called Klipy: What That Means For You
articles.description:
WhatsApp Update: WhatsApp is preparing to bring in a new GIF provider called Klipy to replace Tenor, which is shutting down its official API on July 1, 2026. The change is currently under development and is expected to roll out in a future update. This comes as WhatsApp looks to ensure that its in-app GIF search keeps working without disruption for users.

The move was spotted in the latest WhatsApp beta for Android 2.26.21.7 update, available on the Google Play Store. WhatsApp also plans to bring Klipy support to iOS.

Why Is WhatsApp Replacing Tenor With Klipy?

WhatsApp currently offers GIF search through two providers: GIPHY and Tenor. GIPHY is widely used across several social platforms and offers a large library of animations.

Tenor, on the other hand, focuses on fast keyword-based search and reaction GIFs. Both power WhatsApp's built-in GIF search, though users are only assigned to one provider at a time, not both.

ALSO READ: Vivo X300 FE vs X200 FE: One Costs Rs 20,000 More And Still Loses

Recently, Tenor announced it will discontinue its official API on July 1, 2026. This means platforms that rely on it, including WhatsApp, will no longer be able to pull GIF results through Tenor the same way. For users currently assigned to Tenor, this could break GIF search entirely if WhatsApp does not act.

To address this, WhatsApp is introducing Klipy as a third GIF provider. Klipy is a GIF search service that works through a structured API, similar to GIPHY and Tenor. It will not go live immediately, but will be activated once Tenor's API is fully shut down.

How Does WhatsApp Manage Its GIF Search System?

WhatsApp splits its users between GIPHY and Tenor rather than routing everyone through one provider. This keeps load balanced and reduces the risk of a single point of failure. If one provider goes down, the other continues to serve users.

ALSO READ: Could iPhone 18 Pro Max Get A 7-Inch Screen? Here Is What Leaks Are Saying

Adding Klipy extends this approach, giving WhatsApp a backup once Tenor exits. The feature is still being refined, and a wider rollout is expected once testing is complete.

articles.title: Could iPhone 18 Pro Max Get A 7-Inch Screen? Here Is What Leaks Are Saying
articles.description:
iPhone 18 Leaks: Apple's iPhones are among the most-watched smartphone launches every year, and the buzz around the next generation has already started building, months before any official announcement. While Apple has not confirmed anything about the iPhone 18 Pro and iPhone 18 Pro Max yet, fresh leaks are giving early hints about what could be coming.

From display changes to a redesigned Dynamic Island, here is what the rumour mill is saying ahead of the expected September launch.

What Do The Latest iPhone 18 Pro Leaks Reveal?

A tipster who goes by the handle @MajinBuOfficial on X shared images of what appear to be protective films for the iPhone 18 Pro and iPhone 18 Pro Max. The images suggest the upcoming models could feature taller and slightly narrower displays, along with a smaller Dynamic Island cutout.

ALSO READ: Vivo X300 FE vs X200 FE: One Costs Rs 20,000 More And Still Loses

Rumours indicate the iPhone 18 Pro may come with a display of around 6.4 inches, while the iPhone 18 Pro Max could feature a nearly 7-inch panel. For context, the current iPhone 17 Pro has a 6.3-inch screen, and the iPhone 17 Pro Max carries a 6.9-inch panel. If the display size does not change, Apple may retain the same panel dimensions as the current models.

A shift to taller displays would be a noticeable design change, as Apple has largely kept the front layout of its Pro iPhones the same across several generations. Separately, reports also suggest Apple could reduce the Dynamic Island size by around 25 to 35 per cent, though nothing has been confirmed officially.

How Many iPhone 18 Models Are Expected This Year?

Most of the current chatter online is focused on three models: the iPhone 18 Pro, iPhone 18 Pro Max, and the iPhone Fold, also referred to as the iPhone Ultra.

ALSO READ: Do You Use ChatGPT For Work? This Study Says It Gets Things Wrong 30% Of The Time

The standard iPhone 18, iPhone 18e and iPhone Air are widely expected to arrive the following year. Altogether, the iPhone 18 lineup could include up to six smartphones.

As always, none of these details is confirmed, so treat the leaks with caution until Apple makes an official announcement.

articles.title: 2026 Tata Tiago, Tiago EV Launch Live: Check On-Road Price, Mileage, Range, Features, Colours And Variants
articles.description: 2026 Tata Tiago, Tiago EV Launch Live: 2026 Tata Tiago and Tiago EV will launch in India today with major updates across design, cabin technology, features and equipment. Tata Motors has already revealed most of the exterior and interior changes ahead of the official price announcement, and both hatchbacks now look noticeably more premium than before. The updated Tiago gets a sharper front fascia inspired by newer Tata models, redesigned bumpers, slimmer lighting elements and a connected-style rear lightbar. The Tiago EV also adopts a cleaner EV-specific face with revised LED detailing and fresh alloy wheel designs. Interior Inside, the changes are even more extensive. Both hatchbacks receive an all-new dashboard layout with a floating touchscreen infotainment system, revised centre console and larger digital displays. Top variants will feature a 10.25-inch touchscreen, dual wireless phone chargers, rear AC vents, Type-C charging ports and a 360-degree camera, features rarely seen in this segment. Tata is also adding paddle shifters on AMT variants of both the petrol and CNG-powered Tiago, a move that could become a major talking point at launch. Mechanical Details Mechanically, the Tiago is expected to continue with the familiar 1.2-litre petrol engine along with factory-fitted CNG variants. Mileage figures are likely to remain close to the current model, which delivers around 19 kmpl in petrol form, while the CNG versions are expected to continue targeting cost-conscious city buyers. The Tiago EV is expected to retain its existing battery pack options, though Tata could fine-tune efficiency and feature packaging. The current model offers a claimed MIDC range of up to 315 km, and the facelift is expected to continue targeting urban EV buyers looking for an affordable electric hatchback. Expected Price and Rivals Expected prices for the 2026 Tata Tiago could start from around Rs 5 lakh (ex-showroom), while the Tiago EV facelift is likely to begin near the Rs 8 lakh mark. Both cars will continue rivalling hatchbacks such as the Maruti Suzuki WagonR, Celerio, Swift and Citroen eC3 EV in their respective segments.

This victory significantly bolsters software supply-chain security.

articles.title: 'MLB The Show Mobile' launches with card packs, PvP & pricey bundles
articles.description: Sony launched "MLB The Show Mobile" for iPhone and Android with free-to-play monetization and high hardware requirements as it pushes deeper into the mobile sports market. Sony's new MLB game Sony says it built " MLB The Show Mobile " from the ground up for smartphones instead of adapting the console version of "MLB The Show" directly. The company centered the release around collectible player cards, progression systems, and competitive multiplayer modes. Promotional material tells players to "Build your team. Set your strategy. Stack rewards." Sony is also using pre-registration bonuses to pull existing "MLB The Show" players into the new mobile ecosystem. Sony released "MLB The Show Mobile" as a free download, but the App Store listing heavily promotes paid card packs, season passes, booster bundles, and virtual currency.
